name: Halibut in Creamy Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 12 oz pkgs frozen halibut steaks, thawed
2/3 cup milk, or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the halibut steaks dry with a paper towel.
2. Place the steaks in a Crock-Pot (slow cooker).
3. In a separate bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of flour, 1 tablespoon of sugar, and 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
4. Melt 1/4 cup of butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
5. Stir in the flour mixture until well blended.
6. Gradually add the dry white wine and milk (or half and half) to the saucepan, stirring constantly.
7. Cook the sauce over medium heat until it thickens. Allow it to boil for 1 minute while stirring.
8. Pour the sauce evenly over the halibut steaks in the Crock-Pot.
9. Cover the slow cooker and cook on High for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the fish is cooked through.
10. Transfer the halibut steaks to a serving platter.
11. Garnish with lemon wedges.
Serves 6.
